final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original concept art illustration for a medieval fantasy dragon lair scene.

Style/medium: game concept art, Dungeons & Dragons classic fantasy aesthetic, photorealistic rendering with painterly brushwork
Composition: wide establishing shot, low-angle perspective emphasizing the dragon's scale and dominance, depth of field with foreground treasure and background cave entrance
Subject: massive ancient dragon with deep crimson and black interwoven scales, wings fully spread covering most of the cavern space, eyes emitting intense golden glow, coiled atop a mountain of gold coins and treasures
Scene/backdrop: active volcano lava cavern interior, molten lava flowing down cave walls, treasure pile containing exotic magical artifacts, ancient armors, and glowing magical gems, distant cave entrance with moonlight filtering in
Lighting/mood: warm orange-red lava glow illuminating dragon scales with complex light-shadow interplay, single beam of cool moonlight from cave entrance creating warm-cool contrast, dramatic and epic atmosphere
Color palette: deep crimson and black as dragon base, orange and gold as lava and treasure highlights, cool silver-blue moonlight accent against warm volcanic tones
Materials/textures: glossy obsidian-like dragon scales with metallic sheen, rough volcanic rock surfaces, molten liquid metal lava, polished gold coins and gems with reflective surfaces
Avoid: cartoonish stylization, flat lighting, oversaturated neon colors, 8K stuffer aesthetic, anime proportions
